title: Integrate >=3 datasets (deterministic batch correction)
context: M3 cross-dataset reference atlas via deterministic, reproducible integration. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Integrate at least 3 standardized + annotated datasets using deterministic batch correction, recording method, params, and tool versions.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 standardized+annotated datasets integrated; method + params + tool versions recorded.
Reproducible by an independent runner; BR + DR sign-off.
